PARTIALLY_ANSWERABLE.prefix_text: 根据当前检索到的资料，只能确认以下部分：
PARTIALLY_ANSWERABLE.description: Some requested documents are missing; limited answer with restricted prefix.

NOT_ANSWERABLE.fallback_message: I cannot answer this question based on the available evidence.
NOT_ANSWERABLE.description: Evidence missing or irrelevant; LLM must NOT be invoked.

CALCULATION_BLOCKED.fallback_message: The requested calculation could not be completed with the available data.
CALCULATION_BLOCKED.description: Calculation pipeline returned BLOCKED or FAILED; LLM must NOT be invoked.
